uplink.description: TTN example: standalone temperature probe (0x02) + TH module (0x03) on port 10
uplink._note: Input bytes are the upstream TTN example; expected.data is this normalized codec's output, value-checked against the upstream Apache-2.0 reference decoder (Temperature_Sensor=20.9, TH temp=22.2, humidity=61, Supply_Voltage=3018 mV). The 0x03 TH module owns air.temperature; the standalone 0x02 probe is preserved as the camelCase extra temperatureSensor.
Synthetic in-bounds payload. Reference decode: TH_Sensor_Temperature=21.0 (0x00D2*0.1), TH_Sensor_Humidity=55, Supply_Voltage=3600 mV -> battery 3.6 V.

uplink.description: Combined climate modules: TH (0x03) + concentration/CO2 (0x08) + brightness (0x0B) + pressure (0x0E) + motion (0x0C) + battery indicator (0x07)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising every climate/environmental module. Reference decode: TH temp 21.0 / hum 55; Concentration 600 (0x0258) -> air.co2; Brightness 100.00 (0x002710*0.01 lx) -> air.lightIntensity; Pressure 1010.0 (0x002774/10 hPa); acceleration In_Motion bit set -> action.motion.detected; Battery_Indicator OKAY. Upstream emits temperature/brightness/pressure as strings; normalized to numbers here.
Synthetic. Reference decode: 0xFFCE > 0x7FFF so -= 0x10000 -> -50, *0.1 -> -5.0 C; humidity 55.
Reference: Decoder() sets decoded.parser_error = 'Wrong Port Number' for any port other than 10. Normalized to an errors array.
Reference: datatype 0x99 (153) hits the default branch, clears decoded and sets parser_error='Data Type Failure --> Please update your payload parser'. Normalized to an errors array.
